skills.name: Repair
skills.description: Open a shop to repair damaged equipment. It is possible for repaired equipment to exceed its maximum durability. Increases price when installing in Dungeon area.

skills.name: Arrest
skills.description: Bind enemies, including boss monsters, to prevent them from moving.

skills.name: Base Camp
skills.description: Set up a base camp for party members. Party members can use the base camp to gain buffs and access to storage.
skills.effect_text:
EXP Gains: +30%
CaptionRatio2 % chance to nullify equipment durability consumption
Duration: CaptionRatio hours

skills.name: Refreshment Table
skills.description: Set up a Refreshment Table where you can prepare a variety of effective dishes. Food on the table can be served to party members, guild members, or both.
skills.effect_text:
Food buff efficacy increases with skill level
Food buff duration: 45 minutes

skills.name: Deadly Combo
skills.description: Slashes multiple times in front of you.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Equipment Maintenance
skills.description: Opens a shop to process weapons and armor, momentarily increasing their abilities. In the armor category, you can process top, bottom, and shield items only. Shop prices increase when installed in a map with a dungeon.
skills.effect_text:
Increases Attack by ([Minimum Attack] + [Maximum Attack]) * CaptionTime %
(Number of attack CaptionRatio )
([Physical Defense] + [Magic Defense]) * CaptionRatio3 %
Increases Defense by (Number of Hits: CaptionRatio2 )
Duration: 1 hour

attributes.name: Deadly Combo: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Deadly Combo] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Cloth Mastery: Sewing Master
attributes.description: * While equipped with 4 pieces of [Cloth] armor, grants [Cloth Mastery: Magic] for 60 minutes to characters that use your Equipment Maintenance or Repair shop.
